keyboard_actions.back-in-note-history: Navigate to previous note in history
keyboard_actions.forward-in-note-history: Navigate to next note in history
keyboard_actions.scroll-to-active-note: Scroll note tree to active note
keyboard_actions.search-in-subtree: Search for notes in the active note's subtree
keyboard_actions.toggle-archived-notes: Show/hide archived notes in the note tree
keyboard_actions.create-note-into: Create note as child of active note
keyboard_actions.create-note-into-inbox: Create a note in the inbox (if defined) or day note
keyboard_actions.edit-note-title: Jump from tree to the note detail and edit title
keyboard_actions.copy-notes-to-clipboard: Copy selected notes to the clipboard
keyboard_actions.paste-notes-from-clipboard: Paste notes from the clipboard into active note
keyboard_actions.cut-notes-to-clipboard: Cut selected notes to the clipboard
keyboard_actions.select-all-notes-in-parent: Select all notes from the current note level
keyboard_actions.toggle-tray: Show/hide the application from the system tray
keyboard_actions.show-cheatsheet: Show a modal with common keyboard operations
keyboard_actions.show-shortcut-hints: Show keyboard shortcuts for the focused widget
keyboard_actions.add-link-to-text: Open dialog to add link to the text
keyboard_actions.follow-link-under-cursor: Follow link within which the caret is placed
keyboard_actions.insert-date-and-time-to-text: Insert current date & time into text
keyboard_actions.paste-markdown-into-text: Pastes Markdown from clipboard into text note
keyboard_actions.cut-into-note: Cuts the selection from the current note and creates subnote with the selected text
keyboard_actions.add-include-note-to-text: Opens the dialog to include a note
keyboard_actions.toggle-right-pane: Toggle the display of the right pane, which includes Table of Contents and Highlights
keyboard_actions.peek-right-pane: Peek the right pane as a temporary panel that floats over the content and closes when it loses focus
keyboard_actions.open-note-externally: Open note as a file with default application
keyboard_actions.toggle-note-hoisting: Toggle note hoisting of active note
keyboard_actions.force-save-revision: Force creating / saving new note revision of the active note
keyboard_actions.save-named-revision: Save a named revision of the active note
keyboard_actions.toggle-classic-editor-toolbar: Toggle the Formatting tab for the editor with fixed toolbar
keyboard_actions.toggle-zen-mode: Enables/disables the zen mode (minimal UI for more focused editing)

keyboard_action_names.insert-date-and-time-to-text: Insert Date and Time to Text

login.title: Login
login.heading: Trilium Login
login.incorrect-totp: TOTP is incorrect. Please try again.
login.incorrect-password: Password is incorrect. Please try again.
login.sso-wrong-account: That account isn't the one linked to this Trilium instance. Sign in with the linked account.
login.sso-not-enrolled: Single sign-on isn't set up yet. Sign in with your password first, then link your account from the settings.

password.incorrect: The password you entered is incorrect.

set_password.title: Set Password
set_password.heading: Set password
set_password.description: Before you can start using Trilium from web, you need to set a password first. You will then use this password to login.

share_page.clipped-from: This note was originally clipped from {{- url}}

test_sync.not-configured: Sync server host is not configured. Please configure sync first.
test_sync.successful: Sync server handshake has been successful, sync has been started.

backend_log.log-does-not-exist: The backend log file '{{ fileName }}' does not exist (yet).
backend_log.reading-log-failed: Reading the backend log file '{{ fileName }}' failed.

content_renderer.note-cannot-be-displayed: This note type cannot be displayed.

notion_import.markdown-export-unsupported: This looks like a Notion "Markdown & CSV" export, which Trilium cannot import. Please re-export your Notion workspace using the "HTML" export format and import that instead.
notion_import.subpage-folders-disabled: This Notion export was created without the "Create folders for subpages" option, so the page hierarchy cannot be reconstructed. Please re-export from Notion with "Create folders for subpages" enabled and import that instead.

anytype_import.protobuf-export-unsupported: This looks like an Anytype "Protobuf" export, which Trilium cannot import. Please re-export your Anytype space using the "Any-Block" format with "JSON" selected and import that instead.
anytype_import.markdown-export-unsupported: This looks like an Anytype "Markdown" export, which Trilium cannot import. Please re-export your Anytype space using the "Any-Block" format with "JSON" selected and import that instead.

import.invalid_file_grant: The file selection has expired or is invalid. Please choose the file again.

pdf.unable-to-export-message: The current note could not be exported as a PDF.
pdf.unable-to-save-message: The selected file could not be written to. Try again or select another destination.

migration.old_version: Direct migration from your current version is not supported. Please upgrade to the latest v0.60.4 first and only then to this version.
migration.automatic_migrations_disabled: Automatic DB migrations are disabled via environment variable TRILIUM_MANUAL_DB_MIGRATION = {{envVarValue}}
migration.wrong_db_version: The version of the database ({{version}}) is newer than what the application expects ({{targetVersion}}), which means that it was created by a newer and incompatible version of Trilium. Upgrade to the latest version of Trilium to resolve this issue.
migration.invalid_db_version: The database version is not a valid number. This usually indicates a corrupted 'dbVersion' option in the database. Please restore from a backup.

sql_init.db_not_initialized_desktop: DB not initialized, please follow on-screen instructions.
sql_init.db_not_initialized_server: DB not initialized, please visit setup page - http://[your-server-host]:{{port}} to see instructions on how to initialize Trilium.

desktop.instance_already_running: There's already an instance running, focusing that instance instead.

script.wrong-environment: Cannot execute note "{{- noteTitle}}" ({{- noteId}}). This is a {{- actualEnv}} script, but execution was attempted in the {{- expectedEnv}}.

error.reserved-keyword: "{{- token}}" is a reserved keyword. To search for a literal value, use quotes: "{{- token}}"
error.cannot-compare-with: cannot compare with "{{- token}}". To search for a literal value, use quotes: "{{- token}}"
error.fulltext-after-expression: "{{- token}}" is not a valid expression. To search for text, place it before attribute filters (e.g., "{{- token}} #label" instead of "#label {{- token}}").

security-dialog.enable-message: Are you sure you want to enable {{settingLabel}}?
security-dialog.disable-detail: This change requires a restart to take effect.
security-dialog.backend-scripting-warning: Backend scripts have full access to the server, including the file system and network.
security-dialog.sql-console-warning: The SQL console allows executing arbitrary SQL queries against the database.
security-dialog.lan-access-warning: Other devices on your local network will be able to connect to this Trilium instance.
